description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the niccokunzmann/ci-latex Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add an expose job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the command xelatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error simpleplc.tex, publishes the generated simpleplc.pdf as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch only. No services, caches, or additional deployment targets are required.
